new_translation: Công ty đang cân nhắc việc kéo dài thời gian bảo hành cho sản phẩm mới.

old_example: It is difficult to assess the full extent of the environmental damage until more data is collected.
new_example: It is difficult to assess the extent of the environmental damage.
new_translation: Thật khó để đánh giá mức độ thiệt hại môi trường.

old_example: The building looks very modern externally, but inside it has been preserved in its original traditional style.
new_example: The building looks modern externally but has a traditional style inside.
new_translation: Tòa nhà trông hiện đại ở bên ngoài nhưng mang phong cách truyền thống.

old_example: Exton is a thriving commercial hub with many corporate headquarters located in the area.
new_example: Exton is a thriving commercial hub with many corporate headquarters.
new_translation: Exton là trung tâm thương mại thịnh vượng với nhiều trụ sở công ty.

old_example: The extraction of olive oil involves crushing the olives and then using a press to separate the oil from the solid components.
new_example: The extraction of olive oil involves crushing olives and using a press.
new_translation: Việc chiết xuất dầu ô liu bao gồm việc nghiền ô liu và ép.

old_example: Outdoor activities were canceled due to the extreme weather conditions forecasted for the weekend.
new_example: Outdoor activities were canceled due to the extreme weather conditions.
new_translation: Các hoạt động ngoài trời đã bị hủy do thời tiết khắc nghiệt.

old_example: He tends to go to extremes whenever he starts a new hobby, spending thousands of dollars on equipment.
new_example: He tends to go to extremes whenever he starts a new hobby.
new_translation: Anh ấy có xu hướng đi đến thái cực khi bắt đầu sở thích mới.

old_example: He has a keen eye for detail, which makes him an excellent quality control inspector.
new_example: He has a keen eye for detail as an inspector.
new_translation: Anh ấy có khả năng quan sát chi tiết tinh tường như một giám định viên.

old_example: The optometrist used a special lamp to examine the patient's eyeballs for any signs of disease.
new_example: The optometrist used a lamp to examine the patient's eyeballs.
new_translation: Bác sĩ đã sử dụng đèn để kiểm tra nhãn cầu của bệnh nhân.

old_example: The optical shop offers a wide variety of stylish eyewear for both children and adults.
new_example: The shop offers a wide variety of stylish eyewear.
new_translation: Cửa hàng cung cấp nhiều loại đồ đeo mắt thời trang.

old_example: The factory was ordered to stop trying to fabricate false international customer reviews for its innovative new technology products recently today.
new_example: The factory was ordered to stop trying to fabricate false reviews.
new_translation: Nhà máy bị yêu cầu ngừng việc cố tạo ra các đánh giá giả.

old_example: The marketing department was criticized for the fabrication of several false success stories in its latest international advertising campaign recently today.
new_example: The marketing department was criticized for the fabrication of false stories.
new_translation: Bộ phận tiếp thị bị chỉ trích vì ngụy tạo các câu chuyện giả.

old_example: The historic office building features a grand marble facade that reflects its unique architectural and cultural history in the city today.
new_example: The building features a grand facade that reflects its unique history.
new_translation: Tòa nhà có mặt tiền lớn phản ánh lịch sử độc đáo.
